meta.title: Grok Imagine AI Image Generator | Prompt-Enhanced | OpenCreator
meta.description: Generate highly aesthetic images with xAI's Grok Imagine. Supports many aspect ratios and output formats, returns an enhanced revised prompt, and offers ultra-low cost pricing on OpenCreator.

hero.description: xAI's text-to-image model for generating highly aesthetic visuals. Grok Imagine supports a wide range of aspect ratios and output formats, and returns an enhanced revised prompt to help you iterate faster—at an ultra-low cost.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Discover what makes Grok Imagine a powerful image generation model

aurora.title: Prompt Enhancement (Revised Prompt)
aurora.description: The API returns a revised_prompt (an enhanced prompt) so you can see what was actually used for generation and iterate more effectively.

photorealistic.title: Flexible Aspect Ratios
photorealistic.description: Generate images in many aspect ratios including 1:1, 16:9, 9:16, 20:9, 2:1, and more—ready for ads, social, and web.

styleModes.title: Multiple Output Formats
styleModes.description: Export images as jpeg, png, or webp depending on your quality and file-size needs.

editing.title: Precise Image Editing
editing.description: Use the Grok Imagine edit endpoint to modify an existing image with a text prompt—ideal for refinements and adjustments.

lowCost.title: Ultra-Low Cost
lowCost.description: Generate images at just 24 credits per image. One of the most cost-effective high-quality image generators available.

fast.title: Creator-Friendly Iteration
fast.description: Combine prompt enhancement, flexible ratios, and editing to iterate quickly and keep your creative workflow moving.

gallery.title: See It In Action
gallery.subtitle: Real examples created with Grok Imagine on OpenCreator

portrait.useCase: Create professional headshots and business portraits with natural lighting and studio quality.

cyberpunk.useCase: Create futuristic cityscapes with neon lights and cyberpunk aesthetic for creative projects.

food.useCase: Generate appetizing food photography perfect for restaurants and food brands.

fashion.useCase: Create stunning fashion and lifestyle portraits with beautiful natural settings.

architecture.title: Modern Architecture
architecture.useCase: Generate minimalist architectural photography with clean lines and geometric shadows.

pricing.title: Best value
pricing.note: Credits are consumed per generation. Actual cost depends on your subscription plan.

0.question: What is Grok Imagine and who developed it?
0.answer: Grok Imagine is xAI's text-to-image model for generating highly aesthetic images. On OpenCreator, you can use it for fast iteration with prompt enhancement and multiple output options.

1.question: What makes Grok Imagine different from other image models?
1.answer: Grok Imagine supports many aspect ratios and output formats, and returns a revised_prompt (enhanced prompt). This makes it easier to understand what was used and iterate on results.

2.question: What aspect ratios does Grok Imagine support?
2.answer: Grok Imagine supports a wide range of aspect ratios including 1:1, 16:9, 9:16, 4:3, 3:4, 3:2, 2:3, 2:1, 1:2, and mobile-specific ratios like 19.5:9 and 20:9.

3.question: Does Grok Imagine enhance my prompt?
3.answer: Yes. The API returns a revised_prompt field (an enhanced prompt) in the response, which you can use to learn how the model interpreted your request and refine future prompts.

4.question: How much does it cost to generate images?
4.answer: Grok Imagine costs just 24 credits per image for text-to-image generation and 27 credits for image editing, making it one of the most affordable high-quality image generators.

5.question: What output formats are supported?
5.answer: Grok Imagine supports JPEG, PNG, and WebP output formats. The default format is JPEG for optimal file size and quality balance.
